metadata.description: Cursor plugins for the Gamut design system: core usage, accessibility, and theming.

plugins.name: codecademy-gamut
plugins.description: Core Gamut consumption: layout, system props, gamut-styles utilities, ESLint alignment, Storybook links.

plugins.name: codecademy-gamut-a11y
plugins.description: WCAG-minded Gamut usage and composition when primitives are incomplete.

plugins.name: codecademy-gamut-themes
plugins.description: ColorMode, Background, semantic tokens, hooks, and platform themes.
